passages.title: Reading Passage A
passages.content: <!-- Example passage body. The uploader only requires non-empty content for the schema and the editor; the actual prose is not used by these example fixtures. Replace with real IELTS passage text when running the uploader end-to-end. -->

questions.instruction: Question 1. Choose the correct answer, A, B, C or D.
questions.content: 1 What is the writer's main point in the passage?

options.label: A
options.text: Underground railways were inevitable once steam engines were invented.

options.label: B
options.text: London's growth in the 19th century created a transport problem that the Metropolitan line solved.

options.label: C
options.text: The author argues that private investment was the only reason the network expanded.

options.label: D
options.text: Tunnelling technology had matured before the Metropolitan line was proposed.

questions.instruction: Question 2. Choose the correct answer, A, B, C or D.
questions.content: 2 Which of the following is mentioned in the passage as a difficulty faced by early tunnel engineers?
